top_signals.title: UK inflation unexpectedly held steady at 2.8% in May
top_signals.summary: Figure will ease BoE fears of a lasting impact from the Iran war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB Officials Say Iran Deal Isn’t Enough to Fix Energy Shock
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank officials are signaling that a US-Iran peace accord won’t necessarily stop them lifting interest rates further, even if it prevents a more pronounced overshoot in inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SFC Moving Ahead With HK$1 Billion Evergrande Payout Plan
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong’s market regulator is proceeding with its plan to compensate minority shareholders of collapsed developer China Evergrande Group, brushing aside a legal challenge by the company’s liquidators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan Tourism Extends Decline on Reduced Flights, China Weakness
top_signals.summary: Japan’s inbound tourism extended its decline in May, weighed down by reduced flights across routes and a prolonged slump in Chinese visitors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ineos and Damler Truck enlist in auto defense push as Europe bolsters military spending
top_signals.summary: The partnership is one of a spate of auto-defense collaborations announced in recent weeks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
